name: Nacirema Operating Company, Inc. v. Johnson
question: Are injuries to longshoremen that occur on piers permanently affixed to shore compensable under the Longshoremen’s and Harbor Workers’ Compensation Act?
description: A case in which the Court held that injuries to longshoremen that occur on piers permanently affixed to shore are not compensable under the Longshoremen’s and Harbor Workers’ Compensation Act.
